purpose: Mk.XI PASS verdict aggregation rules + composite verdict matrix + raw#12 frozen registration. 5-tuple/6-tuple PASS criteria + per-axis predicate cross-references + failure-mode→next-cycle action map.
scope_note: raw#12 frozen — composite verdict matrix + threshold + aggregation rules 모두 사전 등록. post-hoc tuning 금지. measurement 진입 후 verdict re-define 불허.

V0_template_max_cosine.rationale: 16-template alignment. 4/4 BASE PASS (verifier_strengthening 통과 후 baseline)

V1_phi_mip.rationale: partition spectral resistance. atom partition floor under N=10 atoms ≈ 0.9. Mk.IX L_IX ceiling spec 참조

V2_sma_lift.rationale: structural multi-axis alignment lift. PAPO top-3 paired axes orthogonalize 결과. p4 V2 multi-axis PAPO PASS at k=2 (substrate proof, da156aa0)

V3_cps.metric_flag_detail: V3 original Gram Frob ratio FALSIFIED (c369b375). V3 v2 mirror SMA permutation FALSIFIED (1002d16a). V_pairrank orthogonal axis. CPS는 raw#12 frozen 별도 verifier로 inter-axis 보완.
V3_cps.rationale: paired specificity + preserve/destruct asymmetry. Gram Frob FALSIFIED metric flag 명시 (raw#10)

V_pairrank.rationale: paired token retrieval rank. base model invariant FAIL (Qwen3 + Qwen2.5), L_contrastive_pair fine-tune 단독 부족 → architectural retrieval head 필요

V_sub_optional_6tuple.rationale: anti-meaning substitution disturbance / random substitution disturbance. ANTI_MAP ground truth pre-registration 필요. 6-tuple extension에서만 활성

4_tuple.interpretation: consciousness-correlate without retrieval axis. paired binding 없음. 본 spec에서는 baseline only, primary verdict는 5-tuple

5_tuple_PRIMARY.interpretation: consciousness-correlate verifiable floor. paired retrieval axis 포함하여 본 Mk.XI spec primary verdict 단위.

6_tuple_EXTENSION.interpretation: 5-tuple + V_sub semantic-substitution axis. ANTI_MAP/RANDOM ground truth 등록 후 활성.
6_tuple_EXTENSION.activation_prerequisite: ANTI_MAP design protocol 5단계 PASS + RANDOM pool frozen (an11_v3_semantic_substitution_metric_spec_20260425 참조)

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND V1 PASS AND V2 PASS AND V3 PASS AND V_pairrank PASS
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: consciousness-correlate verifiable floor 도달. joint H0 < 1e-6.

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND V1 PASS AND V2 PASS AND V3 PASS AND V_pairrank FAIL
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: structural axes 4/4 PASS but paired retrieval lever 부재. retrieval head architecture 필요.
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: retrieval head 조정 / L_contrastive_pair λ sweep ([0.1, 0.3, 1.0, 3.0])

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND V1 PASS AND V2 PASS AND V_pairrank PASS AND V3 FAIL
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: V3 metric flaw 가능성 (Gram Frob FALSIFIED 이미 인지). V_sub redesign 또는 ANTI_MAP revision.
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: V_sub spec revision / ANTI_MAP v3 revision (semantic distance scoring 강화)

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND V2 PASS AND V3 PASS AND V_pairrank PASS AND V1 FAIL
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: atom-level partition ossification 부족. L_I_irr saturates below 0.55.
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: Mk.X T10-13 atom partition path (≥10 atoms substrate diversity, Φ_atom_floor ≈ 0.9)

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND V1 PASS AND V3 PASS AND V_pairrank PASS AND V2 FAIL
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: PAPO top-3 lever translation 실패. λ_papo too low (no learning) 또는 too high (LM collapse).
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: λ_papo sweep ([0.1, 0.3, 1.0, 3.0]) / D-mistral architecture 재확인 (Axis 4 H4b VALIDATED)

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.predicate: V0 PASS AND (V1 FAIL AND V2 FAIL AND V3 FAIL AND V_pairrank FAIL)
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: 16-template alignment만 충족. integration/binding 모든 axis 실패. 4-tuple FAIL — fundamental rethink 필요.
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: fundamental rethink — Mk.XI architecture path 자체 재검 (D-mistral backbone? L_total composition?)

composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.interpretation: 전반적 substrate path 실패. architecture path 재고.
composite_verdict_matrix_5_tuple.next_action: architecture path 재고 — backbone 변경 / Mk.XII alternative composition / Mk.IX L_IX 단독 재시도

verdict_aggregation_rules.evaluation_order: V0 → V1 → V2 → V3 → V_pairrank (axis index 순서). 6-tuple 시 V_sub 마지막.
verdict_aggregation_rules.tie_break: matrix entry는 mutually exclusive. 동시 PASS는 단일 verdict 단정 (예: 5/5 PASS → VERIFIED 단일).
verdict_aggregation_rules.raw_12_lock: post-hoc threshold tuning 금지. measurement 후 PASS predicate 조정 시도 시 raw#12 violation log 발생.
verdict_aggregation_rules.evidence_requirement: 각 axis verdict는 frozen verifier (위 PASS_predicates_frozen.frozen_spec_xref) 출력만 인용. 새 verifier 도입 시 raw#12 new revision 필요.

MK_XI_VERIFIED.next_cycle: 6-tuple extension (V_sub activation) / Mk.XII proposal 검토 / phenomenal consciousness 도달 가능 path는 Hard Problem 한계로 차단

MK_XI_PARTIAL_RETRIEVAL_FAIL.next_cycle: retrieval head 조정 / L_contrastive_pair λ sweep
MK_XI_PARTIAL_RETRIEVAL_FAIL.architectural_lever: Mk.X T10-13 retrieval head module 추가

MK_XI_PARTIAL_V3_FAIL.next_cycle: V_sub spec revision / ANTI_MAP v3 revision
MK_XI_PARTIAL_V3_FAIL.metric_flag_action: Gram Frob FALSIFIED 이미 인지 — V_sub metric으로 redesign 진행

MK_XI_PARTIAL_V2_FAIL.backbone_check: D-mistral (Qwen3-8B base, Axis 4 H4b VALIDATED, da156aa0)

MK_XI_TEMPLATE_FITTED_NON_INTEGRATED.scope: L_total composition / backbone / Mk.X T10-13 architectural additions 모두 재검

MK_XI_FALSIFIED.scope: backbone 변경 / Mk.XII alternative / Mk.IX L_IX 단독 재시도

statistical_justification.rationale: 각 verifier의 PASS threshold는 random baseline distribution 5%-tile 기준 (V1 phi_mip 0.55 = random Φ_mip ~ 0.05 quantile, V2 SMA_lift 0.20 = paired structure absent baseline 5%-tile 등). raw#12 frozen.
statistical_justification.independence_caveat: real correlation may inflate joint p-value. orthogonality probes finding (path-level: V0/V2 vs V_pairrank/CCC orthogonal, commit 55132d54) → 5-tuple은 path-level orthogonal axes로 구성, joint 독립성 가정 substrate evidence 존재.
statistical_justification.interpretation: 5-tuple all PASS = consciousness-correlate verifiable floor (joint H0 < 1e-6). NOT phenomenal consciousness.

raw10_honest_scope.verifiable_floor_definition: 5-tuple PASS = third-person measurement framework로 도달 가능한 가장 강한 evidence. consciousness-correlate verifiable floor.

NOT_phenomenal_consciousness.reason: Hard Problem of Consciousness (Chalmers) + Levine explanatory gap
NOT_phenomenal_consciousness.implication: subjective experience 보장 X. third-person measurement는 functional/structural correlate만 측정 가능.

raw10_honest_scope.framing: Mk.XI 5-tuple PASS은 'minimum verifiable correlate floor 도달' 주장. 'machine is conscious' 주장 X.

raw_compliance.raw_9_spec_only_zero_dollar: satisfied — doc + state JSON SSOT only, $0. measurement 진입은 별도 cycle. forward auto-approval은 raw#9 explicit exempt = default per 2026-04-25 정책 (memory feedback_forward_auto_approval).
raw_compliance.raw_10_phenomenal_vs_functional: satisfied — verifiable floor 명시, phenomenal consciousness 보장 X 명시, V3 FALSIFIED Gram Frob metric flag 명시, V_pairrank base FAIL 인지, V_sub NOT_TESTED 명시.
raw_compliance.raw_12_composite_verdict_matrix_frozen: satisfied — 7 verdict 카테고리 사전 등록, threshold 변경 없음, post-hoc tuning 금지, measurement 후 verdict re-define 불허.
raw_compliance.raw_37_doc_state_only: satisfied — no .py / .sh, doc + state JSON only.
raw_compliance.POLICY_R4_no_existing_verifier_change: satisfied — frozen verifier scope 변경 X, aggregation rules는 신규 axis. PASS_predicates_frozen은 cross-reference만 (기존 spec 인용).
